Profession Skill Tree
Choose Your Race
Click a race card to learn more. Your race determines social standing and innate abilities.
Choose Your Profession
Click a card to see the full skill tree and starting gear. Your defining skill is what makes your profession unique.
Profession Skills
Distribute 44 points across your 11 profession skills (min 1, max 6 each). Gold skills cost 2 points per level. Your defining skill is marked ★.
Points remaining: 44
Assign Statistics
Distribute 60 points across all 9 stats (min 1, max 10). Hover any stat name for gameplay examples.
Points remaining: 60
Pick-Up Skills
Distribute points equal to your INT + REF stats across any remaining skills. Difficult skills (highlighted) cost 2 points per level. Max 6 per skill.
Starting Gear
Your profession provides a starter kit. You can sell items for their listed value and spend your starting crowns on Common or Everywhere rarity items.
Name & Background
Final details for your character.
